answer: To become a TEP Citizen: 1) Post in the Citizenship thread with your WA nation in TEP, 2) Reply 'CONFIRM' to the telegram a Citizenship Official sends you, 3) Wait for the Office to accept. You must maintain that WA nation and residency.
Use the official Citizenship Application thread in 'Newcomers Start Here' on forum.theeastpacific.com.
Citizenship becomes invalid 12 hours after you leave TEP or leave the WA on your recorded nation. Return and notify in the thread within 12h to keep it.
